calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Jak S. Marquez, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Alabama Street Housing Associates, L.P.
Cynthia Rancatore, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Paula Coombs.

Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 30, 2010.

Exhibit--1--Lease Agreement, dated 06/30/09..........................................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--2--Three (3) Day Notice to Pay Rent
or Surrender Possossion of Premises......................................ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Alabama Street Housing Associates, L.P., and against defendant Paula Coombs as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,854.00.
Holdover Damages - $1,205.10.
Costs - $310.00.

Total - $3,369.10.

Additionally, plaintiff Alabama Street Housing Associates, L.P. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2949 18th Street, #205, San Francisco, CA 94110. The lease agreement is forfeited.

Counsel stipulated to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2010 Continued To Jul-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Alabama Street Housing is present. Represented by Cynthia Rancore.
Attorney, Jak Marquez, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Paula Coombs, is present.
Attorney, Katie Danielson , representing the defendant through full scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of JUL19-2010 remains on calendar.
